notes: with_skill pass rate 90% vs without_skill 38% — skill adds significant value
with_skill uses ~4x more tokens due to loading SKILL.md + reference files
Eval 2 with_skill only scored 71% — missed complexity judgment (said 中等 instead of 复杂) and lacked explicit 时机判断
Eval 1 and 6 with_skill scored 100% — strong performance on career and life decisions
Without-skill runs consistently lack 主要矛盾宣告 and '我判断' directional judgment
